flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Skagit Valley College rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.4k → $5.4k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Skagit Valley College rose 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($11.7k → $13.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Skagit Valley College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0k → 2.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Skagit Valley College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).
